negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_002
prompt: A minimalist living room scene begins with a static shot of a mustard-yellow velvet sofa with a tufted design, positioned against a plain white wall. The sofa's rich color contrasts beautifully with the stark background. In front of the sofa, a light wooden coffee table takes center stage, with a black cylindrical object resting on its left side. To the far right, a dark wooden side table holds a lamp with a black shade. The scene remains unchanged until a grey tennis ball emerges from a black pipe located at the edge of the coffee table. The ball rolls smoothly across the table's surface towards the right, eventually rolling off-screen. The final frame shows the coffee table empty again, with the black pipe still in place, and the tennis ball no longer visible. A medium shot captures the entire setup, emphasizing the contrast between the vibrant sofa and the neutral tones of the room.
